cast.name: 唐纳德·特朗普 Donald Trump

trans_title: 马斯克VS特朗普：一决高下
introduction: Within hours of the Trump v Musk spat erupting on social media, Channel 4 commissioned ITN Productions to produceMusk v Trump: The Showdown,the latest in a series of fast turnaround documentaries for the channel. Commissioned on Friday 6thJune to air on Friday 13th at 8pm, the 1 x 60'programme documents the very public fallout between President Trump and his former Head of DOGE, Elon Musk.They were two halves of the world’s most powerful bromance until it all came tumbling down and descended into a tit for tat online slanging match on a global scale. Once the accusations started to fly Elon Musk and Donald Trump accused each other of incompetencies, wrongdoing and scandal.This film will explore the fall out for America and the rest of the world, as the gloves come off, and ask what both men may do next.Is Elon Musk learning that politics is a tougher game than he expected, and can Donald Trump afford the world’s richest loose cannon anywhere other than on his side?Will Musk take his enormous wealth and influence and throw it behind another party or politician? Or is this another move from Trump's playbook of chaos and will he orchestrate a surprise reconciliation?With leading voices, insiders, and commentators, we will ask if the two men need each other more than they realise and whether their fall out was only about economic policy or if there were deeper rifts and what it could mean for America’s deep space aspiration and any potential missions to Mars.Once best of friends are Musk and Trump now the best of enemies?Musk v Trump: The Showdown is executive produced by ITN Productions Deputy Head of UK Factual, Jeremy Daldry and Daniel Smith and produced/directed by Oliver Price. It was commissioned by Louisa Compton, Head of News, Current Affairs, Specialist Factual & Sport and Nevine Mabro, commissioning editor, News & Current Affairs.
chinese_title: 马斯克VS特朗普：一决高下
